heroDescription: This is a modern, high-performance Vite + React starter template project. Pre-configured with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and shadcn/ui components, it helps developers quickly build React applications.
sectionSub: Out of the box, get started quickly, allowing you to focus on business logic implementation.
card1Desc: Features ultra-fast Hot Module Replacement (HMR) and the latest React 19 features.
card2Desc: Combines next-generation utility-first styling with high-quality, accessible UI components for stunning visual interfaces.
card3Desc: Lightweight, blazing-fast state management with zero boilerplate and built-in persistence for a better developer experience.
ctaDesc: Integrates best practices to provide a stable, fast, and modern front-end baseline.
